name: Cantaloupe Sherbet
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cubed cantaloupe and lemon juice in a blender or food processor fitted with a metal blade. Puree until smooth.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the sugar, honey, and milk until well combined.
3. Add the pureed cantaloupe mixture and vanilla to the bowl of ingredients. Stir until all the sugar is dissolved.
4. Pour the mixture into an ice cream canister.
5. Freeze in an ice cream maker according to the manufacturer's instructions. This will make about 2 quarts.
